title: Countered's No Ravines
description: A mod that removes ravines from Minecrafts Overworld
body:
This Fabric mod prevents ravines from generating in the Overworld by removing the canyon carver from all biomes, including those added by other mods. It ensures a smoother terrain without deep chasms while keeping all other world generation features intact.

This mod is perfect for anyone who wants a server side only mod that improves the experience for players on their server.

Twitter (X): https://twitter.com/RealCountered

Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social
